retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the function does not perform a single refcount operation as its core purpose; it is a teardown routine.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release all resources of a delayed_node (items, metadata, iref, inode). While it calls btrfs_release_delayed_item (a put function), this is one part of broader cleanup logic; the function is not focused on refcount management alone.
